mapper.select: select s.id, s.seatNumber, s.studyRoomId, concat(r.buildingNum, '-', r.classRoomNum) as studyRoom, r.buildingNum as buildingNumber, r.classRoomNum as classRoomNumber, s.status, s.reservedBy, s.reservationTime, s.checkinTime, s.createdAt, s.hasPowerSocket, s.hasMobileTrackSocket, s.isNearWindow as nearWindow from tbl_seat s join tbl_study_room r on s.studyRoomId = r.id order by r.id, s.id

select s.id, s.seatNumber, s.studyRoomId, concat(r.buildingNum, '-', r.classRoomNum) as studyRoom, r.buildingNum as buildingNumber, r.classRoomNum as classRoomNumber, s.status, s.reservedBy, s.reservationTime, s.checkinTime, s.createdAt, s.hasPowerSocket, s.hasMobileTrackSocket, s.isNearWindow as nearWindow from tbl_seat s join tbl_study_room r on s.studyRoomId = r.id where s.id = #{id}
mapper.update: update tbl_seat set status = 'available', reservedBy = null, reservationTime = null, checkinTime = null where id = #{id} and status = 'reserved'
